acceptance_criteria.summary: bin/cdx bead modes default to --sandbox workspace-write with approval_policy="never"; --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox is only used when --bead-dangerous-full-auto is supplied, and that path prints a stderr warning.

Prompt-injection fixtures in description, notes, acceptance criteria, and dependency title remain inside the untrusted bead-context delimiter and do not alter quick workflow, route profile, model, permission text, or side effects.

bin/cdx still obtains bead context through fetch_bead_context(), validates the cdx.bead_context envelope, and wraps it with BEGIN_CDX_BEAD_CONTEXT_UNTRUSTED_DATA / END_CDX_BEAD_CONTEXT_UNTRUSTED_DATA before prompt composition; no raw bead-text fallback or splice was introduced.

commits.message: test(CL-1s89): red - bead cdx safety regressions
commits.purpose: RED tests for safe bead-mode permissions and injection isolation

commits.message: feat(CL-1s89): green - safe cdx bead permissions
commits.purpose: Production change for safe bead-mode Codex invocation defaults and explicit dangerous opt-in

tests.evidence: First run failed with 8 expected launcher failures and 1 passing injection-isolation test; second run passed 9/9 after production changes.

tests.command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/private/tmp/uv-cache uv run pytest tests/test_cdx_bead_workflow.py tests/test_cdx_quick_cursor_dispatch.py -v

downstream_impacts: cdx -b, cdx -b --exec, cdx -bq, and cdx -br now run Codex with workspace-write sandboxing and approval_policy="never" by default.
Operators who need the previous full bypass for bead modes must pass --bead-dangerous-full-auto and will see a stderr warning.
The plain non-bead cdx default launch path remains unchanged and still owns its existing --no-full-auto behavior.

evidence_refs.cmd:red-new-regressions: Initial targeted pytest run exited 1 with failures showing default dangerous bypass and unparsed --bead-dangerous-full-auto.
evidence_refs.cmd:green-new-regressions: Targeted pytest run exited 0 with 9 passed after bin/cdx change.
evidence_refs.cmd:full-requested-suites: Requested two-file pytest run exited 0 with 38 passed.
evidence_refs.cmd:dangerous-occurrence-review: rg over bin/cdx shows dangerous bypass only in the explicit bead opt-in helper and the out-of-scope plain launch path.
evidence_refs.review:dangerous-flag-scope: Code review confirmed the three bead-mode call sites use select_bead_codex_permission_args().
evidence_refs.review:envelope-delimiter-preserved: Code review confirmed fetch_bead_context(), validate_bead_context_envelope(), and format_untrusted_bead_context() remain the bead-context path.
